note: Data fetched from Trustpilot as Google Play Store uses JavaScript rendering. Reviews reflect TikTok app & platform user experiences. Trustpilot pagination blocked beyond page 11, so data covers Dec 2025 - Mar 2026 (~4 months of available data).

reviews.title: TRASH THE APP AND ITS OWNERS
reviews.text: This app is completely disgusting and egregious. Even with never having any violations or suspensions, they continue to block my comments, messages, and posts while also saying that the things I report that are clearly in violation are not. This app and its owners are content in protecting abusers, pedophiles, racism, sexual influencers, and rapists while tearing down others.

reviews.title: Out of order experience from TikTok
reviews.text: Just received my first warning from TikTok over a comment I made about what should happen to monsters who hurt children. They told me this was under the bullying and harassment category. Someone random member sent me a message telling me to f- off and TikTok actually found no violation in it. You need to rethink some priorities TikTok!

reviews.title: Tiktok promotes Scams
reviews.text: Tiktok promotes Scams. Have proof of over 30+ scams. Reported and I got banned for reporting the scam artist on live. To the point its every other scroll. At this point a child would be a better filter.

reviews.title: Bugs message
reviews.text: I can't send a direct message in my account you keep bugging my messages please respond and fixed it thank you

reviews.title: TikTok often has a lot of unnecessary content
reviews.text: TikTok often has a lot of unnecessary and time-wasting content. Once you enter the app, it is difficult to exit.

reviews.title: Only AI support
reviews.text: My account has been age restricted, so I can't use some features normally. I've already tried entering my card number to verify my age, but nothing happened. I really want to be able to message my friends again and keep my streaks. Only AI support available - no help.

reviews.title: I wanna give it 0.
reviews.text: I wanna give it 0.

reviews.title: Tiktok = A waste of time
reviews.text: Having used tiktok for many months, I'd recommend against it. Many posts were being engineered on purpose. A suspicious crypto advert would be placed regularly. I had to fact check most tiktok stories as they were simply false and misleading. I also noticed in my own behaviour that it was becoming addictive. I chose to delete the tiktok all consuming app.

reviews.title: TikTok is very unfair
reviews.text: I think the tiktok is very unfair as I never break any rules. And they delete my video with some 'reasonable' reason which is not!! I uninstall my tiktok now

reviews.title: Terrible - all about money
reviews.text: Terrible! So many unclear restrictions, always everything about money. If you want more freedom, you need to pay more. I feel like I work free for tiktok.

reviews.title: I really do enjoy using this app.
reviews.text: I really do enjoy using this app. It makes my day every time I click into it it's the best for sure

reviews.title: Cannot follow anyone - no support
reviews.text: Created an account a few days ago. The app won't let me follow anyone, not even celebrities. I've been contacting support for days saying they can't resolve it. Terrible app and terrible service.

reviews.title: Positive experience
reviews.text: Great experience overall

reviews.title: Pay to get views scam
reviews.text: It's so very strange how those like scores of yours changes fast when you click on them. Then this banner comes up: pay 4 euros to get more views? This has been going on for a long time now.

reviews.title: Political censorship
reviews.text: Tictok has now banned the live viewing of brotherhood charity who are trying to raise money for British veterans. They ban anything that doesn't follow their political agenda. They have become a propaganda machine.

reviews.title: Platform muting content with copyright music
reviews.text: This platform is a joke. You post videos with music that it has and they keep muting it for copyright. Why do they have the music available? And you only talk to a robot. These platforms are starting to promote more crime & sensual things but anything positive they're blocking and shadow banning.

reviews.title: Full of scammers asking for money
reviews.text: Full of wrong uns. Never known a social media app to be almost purely an app for asking for money. If they're not asking for gifts they will gladly give you their bank details to sent money.

reviews.title: TikTok creator payments are a scam
reviews.text: First off the prices they give you per 1000 views is just a scam, it's literally 40-80 cents. TikTok is literally a millionaire and they can't even give us at least a pound. Do YouTube content instead.

reviews.title: TikTok shop customer service rip off
reviews.text: TikTok customer service lies to you then does impossible things to recover your money so they can get past a 30 day barrier where you cannot get money back. I notified them of a product I bought then the shop closed - I never received a refund. TikTok is allowing scammers to sell articles on their shop without checking them out first.

reviews.title: Causes anxiety
reviews.text: It gives me anxiety and echoes news that frightens the population. It should be banned in all countries.

reviews.title: Scam - purchase not received
reviews.text: Scam, purchase not received.

reviews.title: Deep fakes not removed
reviews.text: You don't get deep fake videos removed - very horrible platform we complain still it is ok for you

reviews.title: Muting my videos / music illegitimately
reviews.text: Keeps muting my videos / music. Even when I have all the rights and proof because I'm the owner and producer and I proved it on email they still say no authorization. TikTok is a joke.

reviews.title: TikTok Shop unsafe products, no refund
reviews.text: I purchased Moringa supplements on TikTok shop. The FDA did a recall on the product due to Salmonella issues. I was not notified by TikTok of this issue. I have received negative feedback when requesting a refund. Both TikTok and the seller are refusing to refund.

reviews.title: bad service
reviews.text: bad service

reviews.title: Unmatched Algorithm, But Still Has Room to Grow.
reviews.text: The app is good due to its unmatched algorithm. However, beyond that, the app is average. This is due to the display of a lot of ads after every video, and the other features have been replicated by lots of other apps.

reviews.title: Tiktok is a great thing
reviews.text: Tiktok allows for people of all ages to express themselves in any way that they please. It gives people something to pass time with and also use as a career.

reviews.title: Misleading products on TikTok shop
reviews.text: I recently purchased a Litokam camera via TikTok and have experienced significant performance issues. Attempts to resolve this issue via TikTok support have been unhelpful. I am concerned about the transparency and reliability of the products sold on your platform.

reviews.title: Neutral about it
reviews.text: I feel neutral about it. I mainly just scroll away watching videos. Some stuff is informative but others are just lying.

reviews.title: Lost business account with 60k followers
reviews.text: They want to make money off of their users but doesn't want users of the app to make a living with all their ridiculous and unreal guidelines! Just lost my business accounts with almost 60k followers organically grown from day 1 of being a licensed business a year and a half ago.

reviews.title: Entertaining for users but nightmare for creators
reviews.text: Tiktok can be entertaining to use but if you want to become a creator, it would be really hard to be discovered because tiktok is really unfair to some people and only promotes paying people or people who are already known.

reviews.title: Good App
reviews.text: The app is good and feels just like the app version. However, one point off because the videos and scrolling speed is much less

reviews.title: Worse experience!!
reviews.text: Worse experience!!

reviews.title: Doesn't help when people upload your content
reviews.text: Doesn't help when people upload your content without permission

reviews.title: App not working properly - follower count bugs
reviews.text: This app is rubbish. I only have it since January and for the last 5 days I had 2220 followers, I was receiving notifications with new followers, but my numbers stayed the same. Also the app forces you to engage with other creators posts, then blocks you from interacting too much.

reviews.title: Banned from posting on day 1
reviews.text: Total dogshit company. No real person support. AI just daily repeats a pasted reply. You will never get any help. Being new to TikTok, on the first day of making posts, I was immediately permanently banned from posting. Great way to welcome new users.

reviews.title: Content not suitable for teenagers
reviews.text: Some content is not suitable for everyone, especially teenagers.

reviews.title: Tiktok is unfair to content creators
reviews.text: I think tiktok is very unfair against content creators. Most of the time the big names just copy from the smaller ones. Tiktok views also work unfairly: the more you post, the more views you get. Small content creators almost always give up.

reviews.title: Good content but triggers cringy videos
reviews.text: Like the new and trendy contents but sometimes it triggers cringy videos and I can't get rid of it.

reviews.title: Long-term use is a waste of time
reviews.text: Long-term use is a waste of time and carries the risk of addiction.

reviews.title: Customer support is non-existent
reviews.text: Their customer support is non-existent. Their system picked my account as if it is in the USA so I couldn't promote. After failing to resolve that with them, I deleted the account, created a new one, bought coins so that I can promote, guess what, PROMOTE IS NOT AVAILABLE. Tried reaching out to them to no avail.

reviews.title: Slow app with censorship
reviews.text: Slow app, a lot of censorship.

reviews.title: TikTok cancelled my order without permission
reviews.text: They cancelled my order after me saying I did not want it canceled and then told me there was nothing they could do when they took it upon themselves to cancel my order. This makes me never want to order from them again.

reviews.title: Account Not Recommended flag - no support
reviews.text: There is effectively no real support on TikTok. Users are forced to interact with automated bots. Thousands of creators are reporting the same problem: an 'Account Not Recommended' flag for no valid reason. The appeal form is broken. TikTok continues to prompt creators to pay for promotions while simultaneously suppressing their reach due to this erroneous enforcement.

reviews.title: Personal data security concerns
reviews.text: There are concerns about personal data security.

reviews.title: Flagging videos and password recovery GAMEBREAKING bugs
reviews.text: 1) TikTok has flagged many of my videos for absolutely no reason! 2) I forgot the password in one of my accounts and the recovery process is completely broken - it asks me for my existing password when I just said I forgot it. 3) If I try to login via a verification code it always does NOT work! 4) Changed country then it wouldn't let me change password for months for 'security reasons'. There is ABSOLUTELY NO QA in this platform!

reviews.title: Platform for hate and racism
reviews.text: Tik tok has become a platform to display hate and racism. You can post whatever you want but cannot comment back in a way that meets the post.

reviews.title: Pay to win scam
reviews.text: Videos flop all time, but if you spend money you get a measly 10k views. The whole app is a pay to win scam and every 2 videos are either an ad or a live. Video/account moderation is a total mess because people's accounts get taken down for no reason. TikTok was way better before.

reviews.title: TikTok shop lying to avoid refund
reviews.text: Took 10 days for courier to admit item was lost. TikTok shop gave NO support. When Evri finally admitted it was lost, TikTok shop said Evri hadn't said it despite it being there in black and white. NEVER BUY ANYTHING FROM TIKTOK shop that is more than 3 quid. Appalling.

reviews.title: Banned for no reason
reviews.text: Keep banning me for no reason, sick of it

reviews.title: Difficult to return false-advertised products
reviews.text: Once you have bought a product it's difficult to return it because of the false advertising. Also they ask me for a review after I received the product and I gave them a bad review because it's not what it advertised.

reviews.title: 0 star for TikTok shop customer service
reviews.text: Lol if I can only give 0 stars for tiktok shop - no consumer protection. Imagine being scammed by the seller yet still continuously being rejected for support. I'm not even asking for a refund I only ask them to let the seller reply to me.

reviews.title: Counterfeit products on TikTok shop
reviews.text: Bought from fake company selling counterfeit products. Tried to return them and the return link just faded out - no human to try and sort issues. Had to cut my losses.

reviews.title: False returns policy - damaged goods
reviews.text: Very disappointed from a recent purchase where the item had a 30 day free returns policy. The item was delivered damaged and have been told I have to pay for the return. Basically false advertising.

reviews.title: Order lost, no refund, just robots
reviews.text: Order placed 10 days later nothing. Evri delivery but they said they had it tracking stopped. My contract is with TikTok - you get a robot who tells you the same thing for days. Still no refund. I advise anyone be prepared for let down.

reviews.title: Incredible experience
reviews.text: It was an incredible experience

reviews.title: It's just ok
reviews.text: Used to be really fun and now it's just ok. I would want less ads and less repetitive stuff.

reviews.title: Lots of ads and copied content
reviews.text: TikTok has a wide variety of content but most of it is very bland and copied from other creators. Also certain creators go through more time editing videos but get less recognition than others that don't spend as much time. There are a lot of ads in TikTok as well.

reviews.title: TikTok shop refund policy non-existent
reviews.text: My review is based on TikTok customer service refund policy for Faulty Goods which is basically non-existent. TikTok have sent me round in circles for a week asking for video evidence, pictures of box and manual etc. I suspect now I'm not going to get a refund.

reviews.title: TikTok used to be fun
reviews.text: TikTok used to be fun, but now it's frustrating. Too many ads, repeated content, and the algorithm doesn't show what I like. App crashes sometimes and uses too much data. Needs serious improvement.

reviews.text: It's great app

reviews.title: TikTok killing creativity, banned with 40k followers
reviews.text: I had a growing creative community of 40,000 real followers. My videos were gaining millions of views. I even paid for TikTok Ads. Result? A permanent ban for nothing. Absurd Moderation: my comments were blocked for no reason. Zero Human Support: you are forced to talk to brainless bots. Double Standards: while my creative content was banned, the platform is crawling with 18+ content, scams, and fraudulent accounts. TikTok has turned from a creative hub into a poorly managed dump.

reviews.text: I had a parcel not delivered to my flat door. My point is why not leave at the address flat number door. I am not offered a refund or replacement order.

Also there's a new issue when scrolling through videos sometimes they don't load at all and you just get to see the loading icon. Also a lot of scams have appeared with the shop and links they send.

reviews.title: Failed to process earnings, stole rewards
reviews.text: Tiktok has failed to process earned rewards for over 3 months. In the last 2 months TikTok has stolen $275.00 worth of earned rewards. The TikTok support and feedback team are run by AI bots. Tiktok ignores reports of abuse and harassment, including public doxxing and death threats. They allow children to easily circumvent age restrictions and access adult content.

reviews.title: Account suspended for no reason
reviews.text: My account was suspended for no clear reason, and even after submitting an appeal to explain the misunderstanding, it wasn't processed due to unusual activity, which I did not engage in.

reviews.title: Censorship - no freedom of speech
reviews.text: The worse app!! Nothing is allowed to be posted or said. No freedom of speech! Stop using this app so they will go out of business!

reviews.title: No real support - shadow ban creators
reviews.text: Very hard to get any support from the Team. No number to call, no way to appeal violations or talk about money owed from a brand. They usually get you to build a large portfolio then simply shadow ban you and change the link in your ads.

reviews.title: Automatically billed without consent
reviews.text: TikTok ads support is absolutely useless. I was automatically billed £80 without consent, and it was never even reflected in my balance. When I tried to raise the concern, they pretended they had no idea what I'm talking about.

reviews.title: Never received refund since December
reviews.text: I ordered two new bras which I never received. TikTok said I would receive a full refund. Since the 13th of December 2025 I have never received it. Disappointed.

reviews.title: Poor customer services
reviews.text: Poor customer services and poor sellers they don't respond to messages or help you with your lost parcels. They just tell you nothing they can do.

reviews.title: So addictive
reviews.text: So addictive, but the recent recommendations haven't been very accurate.

reviews.title: Great for humor and variety of content
reviews.text: My experience was awesome with varied types of content and great creators. One thing is that the moderation needs to be better with the occasional inappropriate content I see.

reviews.title: Very addicting app
reviews.text: I'd say it is a very addicting app. Very not necessarily for all ages unless you put the child version on which is very smart and helpful if you want to protect younger viewers. Very diverse and FYP customizes what comes up.

reviews.title: Accessible and creative
reviews.text: Very creative videos selection, millions of users, easy communication, very safe

reviews.title: Racism allowed but reporting flagged
reviews.text: Disgusting, they allow racism towards white people. Every time I report there is no violation and me sticking up gets a violation. I've seen so many disturbing things on there.

reviews.title: Quick and easy to watch
reviews.text: I love watching tiktok when I'm bored

reviews.title: Great new trends and connections
reviews.text: Tiktok is great - new trends, new dances and also see what your friends are doing. You can also make new friends.

reviews.title: TikTok helps you not be bored
reviews.text: TikTok gives me something to do when I'm bored

reviews.title: TikTok encourages discrimination
reviews.text: TikTok allows users to get discriminated. Constantly flagging up comments that are not offensive but allowing profiles to defame and portray racism, hate and bullying.

reviews.title: Great social features
reviews.text: I can join lives, shop, scroll and have fun in one app. I met new people that live around me.

reviews.title: You Ruined My Generation
reviews.text: Thanks to the content creators on your platform, the mass of my generation is just narcissistic, violent, brainrot addicted jerks. Almost everyone at my school is so full of themselves. There are fights that break out for the littlest things. I blame TikTok due to its fast-paced, plotless, mindless, easy-to-access content.

reviews.title: Arbitrary moderation, automated censorship
reviews.text: This appears to be a false positive by automated detection. The content represents parody and cultural heritage, not hate speech. I respectfully request a human review, as automated filters may not correctly interpret context and satire.

reviews.title: Great app - so fun
reviews.text: It is so fun to watch, it feels like I was on TikTok for like 10 minutes but it was actually like 3 hours. I love it.

reviews.title: Shopping is great, support is awful
reviews.text: TikTok shopping is chef's kiss - easy to browse, loads of great deals. BUT customer support is non-existent. Created two accounts and lost access to the other one with no help available. The reporting options are hidden and nothing happens anyway.

reviews.title: Very entertaining app
reviews.text: It is a very entertaining app, it keeps you updated

reviews.title: Fun to discover trends and music
reviews.text: TikTok has been a fun way for me to discover new trends, music, and creative videos. Sometimes I spend too much time scrolling, but I also learn a lot and get inspired by other creators.

reviews.title: Full of scammers
reviews.text: Tiktok great if you want scammers, beggars, pros and escorts in your life. Really is inundated with filth yet it's allowed - no vetting here.

reviews.title: Promote payment taken, no refund
reviews.text: I paid to use TikTok's Promote feature, but the service did not work as expected. Despite contacting support, the issue remains unresolved and no refund has been provided. Given that this is a paid feature, I expected basic accountability.

reviews.title: Customize to fit you - very local
reviews.text: Very entertaining app and gets very local. I learn a lot about what's happening in my city from TikTok and would be five stars if it wasn't so addictive.

reviews.title: Love all kinds of amazing videos
reviews.text: I love TikTok you can see all kinds of amazing videos

reviews.title: TikTok is amazing
reviews.text: The unlimited videos and an awesome way to make you laugh. I think they are doing well because they created the best app for funny, entertaining videos.

reviews.title: Horrible support system - hacked account
reviews.text: Horrible support system that just locks your account after reporting a hack. It's impossible to get a hold of them. They send you around a loop and make it your responsibility to fix their mistakes. You're probably better off fixing the issue yourself.

reviews.title: Unstable connection
reviews.text: Unstable connection. It's been weeks since it was good

reviews.title: Terrible app - full of scammers
reviews.text: Terrible app with only crap content full of scammers, spammers, and fake accounts; not secure at all.

reviews.title: Biased platform censoring free speech
reviews.text: Total tosh, rubbish, biased Communist agenda. Does not like the truth from people yet allows any anti-west rhetoric. Does not allow free speech.

reviews.title: Political censorship
reviews.text: They censor everything and everyone with a point of view other than their extremely conservative one. They restrict anything relating negatively towards the president. Yet at the same time, they allow people to sell swastika necklaces on The TikTok shop and claim self-expression.

reviews.title: Tiktok is a joke - no freedom of speech
reviews.text: Tiktok is a joke. People post stupid videos and when you give an opinion tiktok flags you right away. What kind of freedom of speech is that? Also the TikTok shop sucks - all the stuff you buy there is so cheap 'temu quality', pure junk.

reviews.title: Amazing platform for creativity
reviews.text: TikTok is an amazing platform that offers endless creativity and entertainment. The app is very easy to use. The algorithm recommends videos that truly match my interests. TikTok is fun, innovative, and highly addictive in a positive way.

reviews.title: Delivery delays from TikTok shop
reviews.text: I rate this app at three because when I was trying to order something, it took a week and it said it was gonna be here in three days and it never came.

reviews.title: TikTok support does not exist - password issue
reviews.text: Created account, saved password, now this password doesn't work, but they can't send me a password change email. Instead they keep answering with the same message asking me to provide sign-up date, location, device - information I don't have. Idiots.

reviews.title: Animal abuse allowed, innocent users banned
reviews.text: Disgusting app - never bans when you report people who show animal abuse because they're getting money from this person. Then bans on stupid stuff. This app is a joke.

reviews.title: Privacy concerns and unnecessary content
reviews.text: There are doubts about privacy and there is a lot of unnecessary content.

reviews.title: Unfair video removal - no reason
reviews.text: I am filing a formal complaint regarding the unfair removal of my video. The content was active for 2 days with high engagement. The video contains NO nudity, NO violence, and uses a licensed, authorized sound. The moderation system is very disappointing - many harmful posts stay active without issues, yet my safe content is removed.

reviews.title: Recommend TikTok - good content initially
reviews.text: I recommend this app, good content in the first 2 to 3 days after install.

reviews.title: Scam - paid for promotions, zero results, no refund
reviews.text: I paid for promotional services with promised results, none of which were delivered. Despite full payment, the promotion tool delivered extremely bad results. Contacting customer support regarding the compensation for scamming and refund are ignored. The complete lack of accountability, transparency, and response suggests unethical business conduct.

reviews.title: Why I love TikTok
reviews.text: Because you can come up on a lot watching TikTok and it's a lot of things you can do on there - make videos, text people, reply to posts.

reviews.title: Inconsistent live moderation - profit driven
reviews.text: I've repeatedly encountered TikTok Live content that appears to push the boundaries of the platform's own guidelines, particularly in monetized streams. Reports submitted through in-app tools were dismissed without explanation. TikTok's Live moderation is inconsistent and lacks transparency.

reviews.title: Full of brainrot content
reviews.text: Full of actual brainrot content

reviews.title: TikTok Shop Banned Me After 1000+ sales
reviews.text: I built my small business from the ground up on your platform - over 1000 verified sales, glowing 5-star reviews. And what do I get? A permanent account ban. No warning. No clear reason. Just a cold, automated email saying 'violation of community guidelines'. I've spent weeks trying to appeal - messages disappear into the void, live chat agents give copy-paste responses with zero relation to my case.

reviews.title: Scam products not removed
reviews.text: These robotic dogs being sold - I reported it's a scam, false advertising. According to TikTok no violation - it's ok to con people out of money. These people are a law to themselves.

reviews.title: Mobile phone purchase not received
reviews.text: TikTok just took money for a mobile phone I didn't receive. The tracking process delayed me from asking for a refund. By the time I requested a refund the supplier store was closed.

reviews.text: My ads get rejected without any reason, and support not answering for 4 days just before Christmas.

reviews.title: Account permanently banned, no explanation
reviews.text: I am deeply disappointed by TikTok's decision to permanently ban my account without any clear explanation. My account focused on traveling to EDM events and sharing the culture and joy of rave life. There was nothing harmful or inappropriate in my content.

reviews.title: Bug reports ignored, treated as incompetent
reviews.text: If I report a bug through your official website interface, I expect you to actually investigate the bug instead of treating all of your users like incompetent fools. Reporting it through your completely ineffectual in-app AI is not a solution.

reviews.text: One of my videos got banned and labeled as terrorism. It took them two months to review it and then permanently banned it.

reviews.text: Honestly they let videos of murders get approved but I can't upload my airsoft sport videos that indicate no violence whatsoever.

reviews.text: I would if I could leave less than a star. Absolutely Rubbish.

reviews.title: 2 months trying to recover hacked account
reviews.text: Absolutely appalling customer service! I reached out to them as someone had gained access to my account, they blocked it great. For nearly 2 months now I have been trying to get my account back, with literal robots replying to my emails consistently.

reviews.title: TikTok shop - returned phone, never refunded
reviews.text: I purchased a phone from a seller on TikTok shop, turned out to be rubbish so I returned it. Once they received their phone back they never refunded me and TikTok customer service didn't help at all.

reviews.title: Faulty product caused windscreen damage
reviews.text: A glass cleaning brush set I purchased caused significant damage to my vehicle's windscreen. The product left a chemical film and deep streaks across the glass. TikTok customer service was pathetic and unprofessional.

note_for_sample: Reviewer names have been removed. This is a sample dataset for demonstration purposes.
